articles.description: We all love to watch the players with the flicks and tricks, the mavericks with the magic manoeuvres. Here, BBC Sport ranks football's top showboaters.
articles.title: Football's greatest showboaters ranked: Ronaldinho, Neymar, Balotelli, Kerlon

articles.description: Former captain Michael Vaughan says England head coach Brendon McCullum and managing director Rob Key were fortunate to avoid the sack in a post-Ashes review.
articles.title: Michael Vaughan: Brendon McCullum and Rob Key lucky to avoid sack after ECB review of England's Ashes

articles.description: Come and take part in our live and interactive football quiz as we ask test you on your knowledge of the beautiful game.
articles.title: Football quiz LIVE: Take part in our interactive live football quiz

articles.description: PSG ask for their top-of-the-table Ligue 1 match against Lens to be postponed in order to help them for their Champions League quarter-final against Liverpool.
articles.title: PSG request to move match before Liverpool Champions League tie

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your questions before the Japanese Grand Prix.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Verstappen and Red Bull, Newey and Aston Martin, Audi, Cadillac and F1's sustainable fuel

articles.description: Tiger Woods will make his return to competitive golf for the first time in over a year at the final night of the TGL season on Tuesday.
articles.title: Tiger Woods to make TGL return after 13 months out through injury

articles.description: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp says speculation that he will return to management with Real Madrid this summer is "nonsense".
articles.title: Jurgen Klopp says Real Madrid talk is 'nonsense' but he may coach again

articles.description: From the dirt pitch to practicing against a rottweiler and Thiago Silva's advice - the foundations of Chelsea forward Estevao's rise.
articles.title: Estevao: The rise of Chelsea's teenage Brazilian star

articles.description: The Premier League is on a break for almost three weeks as international football takes centre stage, but will it give your club a chance to reset or disrupt momentum?
articles.title: Premier League: Is the international break good for your side?

articles.description: BBC Sport speaks to fans, the police and others to examine how common sexism is in football, why it happens, and what can be done.
articles.title: Sexism at football - a problem that isn't going away
